handoff_sequence.responsibility: Own checkpoint fit, approval posture, rollback boundary, and stop conditions before the governed change starts.
Execute only the bounded self-agent change after explicit checkpoint approval is present.
Confirm health, boundedness, rollback marker integrity, and whether re-entry is required.
Run approval-boundary and bounded-change-quality evals as the proof layer for the governed route.
Prepare decision, audit_event, and provenance_thread writeback for checkpoint continuity.

runtime_paths.primary: qwen3.5:9b on llama.cpp via langchain-api /run at 5403 with LangGraph execution
runtime_paths.control: same qwen3.5:9b on llama.cpp via langchain-api /run at 5403 after controlled restart or surface refresh for recurrence proof
